top_signals.title: US Stocks Dip as Investors Eye Inflation, Chips Stocks Retreat
top_signals.summary: US stocks fell Monday in midday trading as oil prices rebounded amid doubts about the progress of peace talks between the US and Iran. Yields on 10-year Treasuries touched 4.6% and semiconductor stocks traded lower, with sentiment muted and inflation a key concern.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
